headline: Intel Stock Gains 51% in 8 Days. Why the Company Has a ‘Renewed Lease on Life.’
summary: Intel stock is in the midst of its longest winning streak since September 2023. Analysts see momentum continuing with headline-catching deals.

headline: Wall Street Builds New Tool to Bet Against Private Credit
summary: A credit-default swap index could help banks reduce exposure to private credit and let hedge funds profit from turmoil.

headline: APO, KKR, OWL Confront $20B Private-Credit Pullout Demands
summary: The scale of the exit rush that rocked private credit funds during the first quarter is now known. According to calculations by the Financial Times, investors attempted to yank more than $20 billion from such funds during the period, as worries mounted over lending to the software industry, a sector hit hardest by recent jitters that AI could render them obsolete. Several industry titans were impacted by this dash for the exits, including Blackstone (BX), KKR (KKR), Apollo Global Management (APO

headline: SiFive raises $400m to expand RISC‑V data centre and AI roadmap
summary: The company plans to use the capital to expand global engineering teams and speed its roadmap for agentic AI data centre workloads.
